text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sniff... sob... Can I really do it?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Don't cry. Remember what you said about finding
the legendary blade?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This all started a few hours ago while I was
walking past the station...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You want to help out Opera O but don't have the
confidence?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She said she's going to do a new opera
performance that requires a lot of research. So I
offered to help...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But. looking at the map... I don't know if I'll be
able to reach all the destinations!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And that's why you're here crying alone? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I know I said I'd help, but I didn't expect to be
dragged all the way here!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
What exactly is this "legendary blade" research
anyway?!
choice_data_list: Well, you can't bail on her now.
Well, you can't bail on her now.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry! I'm sorry! But... there are children
looking forward to the performance!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to convince me. I already know
you're not turning back... Let's just get this over
with!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, they set out to find the legendary
blade.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaah! It's shaking! We're so high up! I don't like
thiiiis!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Don't look down. Keep your eyes in front of you
while you walk.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But do we have to walk so fast? Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! My shoes are soaked! So are my butt and
back!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Pull yourself together. You're the one who
decided to see this through!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hey? That thing over there... is that...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No way. Is this the legendary...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I managed to get all the
information I needed without a hitch! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That map was pretty useless, wasn't it? What was
Opera O thinking? Geez...
choice_data_list: It took us on a huge detour...
It took us on a huge detour...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm... I'm really sorry about that! It's my fault for
making you do so much...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to apologize for something I
chose to do of my own accord... I'll see you later.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: B-but... Oh! Hold on for just a second!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Can I buy you a tasty drink as thanks? You know
the commercial, right? "When you're feelin' extra
drained, gotta have a honeyade! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No thanks.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I don't need it. Your words are thanks enough.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but! I couldn't... How about something besides
a drink? An ice cream, or a grilled carrot? Or
maybe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. Really. You're the one who put in the
effort, right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But, but... you helped...

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Hey! We knew that was you, Doto! Are you
preparing for today's opera?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they're from the local children's center.
Opera O invited them to watch our show...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, hello, everyone. I actually just finished
preparing. This nice lady here was helping me out.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I didn't do anything. I just followed along.

text_block_list.name: Enthusiastic Boy
text_block_list.text: Wh-whooooaaa! You're like a superhero!

text_block_list.name: Cheerful Girl
text_block_list.text:
You came to Doto's rescue, but you're not even
bragging about it! That's... so cooool!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: H-hold on...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: H-hold on...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I only did what anyone should do.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Whooooa!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Ah, enough! Why did you have to go and say
that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the children surround Admire Vega, she shoots
me a resentful look.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Deal with what?
choice_data_list:
Quickly, Ayabe Ranger! The city needs their
hero!

Quickly, Ayabe Ranger! The city needs their
hero!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You better get going! Thank you for
protecting us, Ayabe Ranger!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Have you... done this before?
choice_data_list: I'm just going with the flow.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Keep it up and someone might come and scout you to be in their play.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we leave, I return Admire Vega's half-weary
grumblings with a wry smile.
